'''鈭歸-s-k''' ('''kawasak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pentuple|pentuple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pentuple|pentuple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-s-k
|-
! Lemma
| kawasak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwasak|thiwasak]] || [[word:jiwasak|jiwasak]] || [[word:shiwasak|shiwasak]] || [[word:kiwasak|kiwasak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwasak|thuthuwasak]] || [[word:jujuwasak|jujuwasak]] || [[word:shushuwasak|shushuwasak]] || [[word:kukuwasak|kukuwasak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwasak|thuwasak]] || [[word:juwasak|juwasak]] || [[word:shuwasak|shuwasak]] || [[word:kuwasak|kuwasak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwasak|thuwasak]] || [[word:juwasak|juwasak]] || [[word:shuwasak|shuwasak]] || [[word:kuwasak|kuwasak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewasak|thewasak]] || [[word:jewasak|jewasak]] || [[word:shewasak|shewasak]] || [[word:kewasak|kewasak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowasak|thothowasak]] || [[word:jojowasak|jojowasak]] || [[word:shoshowasak|shoshowasak]] || [[word:kokowasak|kokowasak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowasak|thowasak]] || [[word:jowasak|jowasak]] || [[word:showasak|showasak]] || [[word:kowasak|kowasak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowasak|thowasak]] || [[word:jowasak|jowasak]] || [[word:showasak|showasak]] || [[word:kowasak|kowasak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]] || [[word:wasak|wasak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wasak|th忙wasak]] || [[word:j忙wasak|j忙wasak]] || [[word:sh忙wasak|sh忙wasak]] || [[word:k忙wasak|k忙wasak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawasak|thathawasak]] || [[word:jajawasak|jajawasak]] || [[word:shashawasak|shashawasak]] || [[word:kakawasak|kakawasak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawasak|thawasak]] || [[word:jawasak|jawasak]] || [[word:shawasak|shawasak]] || [[word:kawasak|kawasak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawasak|thawasak]] || [[word:jawasak|jawasak]] || [[word:shawasak|shawasak]] || [[word:kawasak|kawasak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawasak|shawasak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawasak|goshawasak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawasak|gokishawasak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawasakn眉|shawasakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawasaknkn眉|goshawasaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawasakn眉|gokishawasakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawasaksh毛|shawasaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawasaknksh毛|goshawasaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawasaksh毛|gokishawasaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawasakro|shawasakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawasaknkro|goshawasaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawasakro|gokishawasakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawasakmu|shawasakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawasaknkmu|goshawasaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawasakmu|gokishawasakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawasaksher|shawasaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawasaknksher|goshawasaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawasaksher|gokishawasaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawasakng|shawasakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawasaknkng|goshawasaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawasakng|gokishawasakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawasakya|shawasakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawasaknkya|goshawasaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawasakya|gokishawasakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawasakyam|shawasakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawasaknkyam|goshawasaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawasakyam|gokishawasakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawasakn眉sh毛|shawasakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawasaknkn眉sh毛|goshawasaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawasakn眉sh毛|gokishawasakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawasakn眉ro|shawasakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawasaknkn眉ro|goshawasaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawasakn眉ro|gokishawasakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawasakn眉mu|shawasakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawasaknkn眉mu|goshawasaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawasakn眉mu|gokishawasakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawasaksh毛n眉|shawasaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawasaknksh毛n眉|goshawasaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawasaksh毛n眉|gokishawasaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawasaksh毛ro|shawasaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawasaknksh毛ro|goshawasaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawasaksh毛ro|gokishawasaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawasaksh毛mu|shawasaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawasaknksh毛mu|goshawasaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawasaksh毛mu|gokishawasaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawasakron眉|shawasakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawasaknkron眉|goshawasaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawasakron眉|gokishawasakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawasakrosh毛|shawasakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawasaknkrosh毛|goshawasaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawasakrosh毛|gokishawasakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawasakromu|shawasakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawasaknkromu|goshawasaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawasakromu|gokishawasakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawasakmun眉|shawasakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawasaknkmun眉|goshawasaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawasakmun眉|gokishawasakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawasakmush毛|shawasakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawasaknkmush毛|goshawasaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawasakmush毛|gokishawasakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawasakmuro|shawasakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawasaknkmuro|goshawasaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawasakmuro|gokishawasakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
